# Antigravity Adapter

This repository treats `AGENTS.md` and `.agents/**` as canonical. Antigravity CLI support is conservative because project settings paths may change quickly. When `agy` is installed, validate locally that it reads `AGENTS.md` from the repo root and accepts `.antigravity/settings.json` without startup failure.
